history.summary: Located problem run in prediction-prime: 713 PREV concerns (7.4x all others)
history.outcome: Root cause identified: naive parser + repetitive model output

history.summary: Fixed parser, added dedup, added Big Picture Synthesis phase, renumbered phases

investigation.symptoms: prior_art_scout generated 713 concerns vs 96 from all other adversaries combined (7.4x ratio)

root_causes.title: Naive line-by-line parser
root_causes.description: Parser created new concern for EVERY line starting with digit or dash, fragmenting multi-line concerns into pieces

root_causes.title: Model repetition in output
root_causes.description: Model outputs summary/action items that repeat 35-37 times. 17 unique items appeared 35-37x each = 603 of 713 entries

fixes_applied: Parser now groups numbered items with sub-bullets into single concerns
Added Big Picture Synthesis (Phase 2) for holistic concern analysis
